per_item.question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?
per_item.pred_sql:
select a concise set: "NCT", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Cancer type", "Control regimen", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Primary endpoint".

SQL>
SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Cancer type", "Control regimen", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Primary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal'
  AND "Number of arms" >= 3
  AND ("Control regimen" LIKE '%Regorafenib%'
       OR "Control regimen" LIKE '%Sorafenib%'
       OR "Control regimen" LIKE '%Sunitinib%'
       OR "Control regimen" LIKE '%Axitinib%'
       OR "Control regimen" LIKE '%Pazopanib%')
;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';

per_item.question: Find clinical trials for renal cell cancer that used nivolumab in combination with other treatments?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Primary endpoint", "Secondary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal Cell Carcinoma'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab'
  AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD1';
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

per_item.question: Find Bladder cancer trials using PD1 where PD‑L1 positivity was not an inclusion criterion?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Bladder'
  AND (
        "Class of ICI" = 'PD1'
        OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%'
        OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Pembrolizumab%'
        OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Dostarlimab%'
      )
  AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';

per_item.question: Find Small Cell Lung cancer trials with at least 2 prior therapies that used a combination treatment?

per_item.question: Find Small Cell Lung cancer trials with minimum follow-up and show follow-up duration in months by treatment arm?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up",
       "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen",
       "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" AS "Follow-up (Overall) months",
       "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" AS "Follow-up (Rx) months",
       "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" AS "Follow-up (Control) months"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung'
  AND (
        "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" IS NOT NULL
        OR "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" IS NOT NULL
        OR "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" IS NOT NULL
      );
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of follow-up given", "Cancer type", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Minimum';

per_item.question: Which phase 2 trials for pancreatic cancer compared immunotherapy to a BRAF and MEK inhibitor combination?

FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2'
  AND "Cancer type" = 'Pan pancreatic'  -- adjust if actual value is 'Pancreatic' or 'Pancreatic cancer'
  AND (

        "Control regimen" LIKE '%Dabrafenib%' OR "Control regimen" LIKE '%Trametinib%' OR
        "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Dabrafenib%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Trametinib%' OR
        "Type of combination" LIKE '%BRAF%MEK%' OR
        "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Immunotherapy%' OR
        "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Immunotherapy%'
      )
;

per_item.question: Find trials for breast cancer patients who received at least 2 prior treatments using a combination of therapies?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  "NCT",
  "Trial name",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Total sample size",
  "Cancer type",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
  "Class of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Type of combination",
  "Lines of treatment",
  "Clinical setting",
  "Primary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Breast'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND (

    "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%2%' OR
    "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%three%' OR
    "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%multi%' OR
    "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%prior lines%' OR
    "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%second line%' OR
    "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%second-line%' OR
    "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%≥2%' OR

per_item.question: List trials for bladder cancer that used atezolizumab and trastuzumab emtansine plus a placebo, and had more than 21 months of overall follow-up?

FROM clinical_trials

  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Atezolizumab%'
  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Trastuzumab emtansine%'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND "Control regimen" = 'Placebo'
  AND CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" AS NUMERIC) > 21;

SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Multiple Myeloma'
  AND "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab'
  AND ("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" IS NOT NULL)
  AND CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" AS NUMERIC) > 21;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

per_item.question: Show trials of chemotherapy alone for breast cancer, including the trial identifier, author, year, publication details, phase, and total sample size?

FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Breast'

  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Chemotherapy%';

per_item.question: Which trials of Durvalumab and Tremelimumab for Pancreatic cancer were in phase 2?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT 
  "NCT",
  "PubMed ID",
  "Trial name",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Originial publication or Follow-up",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
  "Class of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Total sample size",
  "Cancer type",
  "Trial phase",
  "Primary endpoint",
  "Secondary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Pancreatic'
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2'
  AND (
        "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Durvalumab%' 
     AND "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Tremelimumab%'
      OR
        "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Durvalumab%' 
     AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Tremelimumab%'
      )
;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab, Tremelimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';

per_item.question: Find phase 3 trials for Hodgkin Lymphoma that compared an immune checkpoint inhibitor to an antibody-drug conjugate?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  "NCT",
  "PubMed ID",
  "Trial name",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Trial phase",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
  "Class of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Type of therapy",
  "Control regimen",
  "Type of control",
  "Cancer type",
  "Originial publication or Follow-up",
  "Primary endpoint",
  "Secondary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hodgkin Lymphoma'
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND (
        -- ICI vs ADC archetype: we look for trials where arms include an immune checkpoint inhibitor and an antibody-drug conjugate
        -- The schema may reflect this via "Treatment regimen" containing an ICI and the comparator containing an ADC (e.g., brentuximab vedotin)
        "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%Pembrolizumab%' OR
        "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%Nivolumab%' OR
        "Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Pembrolizumab%' OR
        "Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Nivolumab%' OR
        "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%Brentuximab vedotin%' OR
        "Treatment regimen" ILIKE '%ADC%' OR
        "Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Atezolizumab%' OR
        "Name of ICI" ILIKE '%Durvalumab%' OR
        "Class of ICI" IN ('PD-L1', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4', 'PD1', 'PD1, CTLA-4') -- broad catch
      )
ORDER BY "Year" DESC;
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hodgkin Lymphoma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Control arm" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';

SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2'
  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Brentuximab-vedotin%'
  AND ( "Cancer type" LIKE '%Esophageal%' OR "Cancer type" LIKE '%Gastroesophageal%' );
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Brentuximab-vedotin';

per_item.question: Find phase 3 trials in non-small cell lung cancer that compared immunotherapy to a multikinase inhibitor, excluding trials where the control arm was chemotherapy?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Trial phase", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Primary endpoint", "Secondary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer'
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND "Type of control" <> 'Chemo'
  AND "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD-L1', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4', 'PD1', 'PD1, CTLA-4');
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'NSCLC' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

per_item.question: What phase 3 trials compared immunotherapy to chemotherapy?

FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND (
        "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy' AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Immunotherapy%'

      )

per_item.question: List trials for renal cell cancer using Nivolumab and Ipilimumab with overall follow-up exceeding 21 months?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT
  "NCT",
  "Trial name",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Cancer type",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
  "Monotherapy/combination",
  "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall",
  "Originial publication or Follow-up"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal Cell Carcinoma'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND (
        "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Ipilimumab%'
      OR
        "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' AND "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Ipilimumab%'
      )
  AND CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" AS NUMERIC) > 21
;

per_item.question: For colorectal cancer trials, what is the median follow-up duration in months by treatment arm?
per_item.pred_sql: WITH data AS ( SELECT "NCT", CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" AS REAL) AS duration, 'Rx' AS arm FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median' UNION ALL SELECT "NCT", CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" AS REAL) AS duration, 'Control' AS arm FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median' ) SELECT arm, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration) AS median_follow_up_months FROM data GROUP BY arm;
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of follow-up given" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

per_item.question: What are the regimens for Phase 2 monotherapy trials studying CTLA-4 in patients with gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy'
  AND "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4'
  AND "Cancer type" IN ('Gastric', 'Gastric/GEJ');
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy';

per_item.question: List trials of atezolizumab and trastuzumab emtansine plus placebo for bladder cancer with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?

  AND "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab'

per_item.question: List trials for Renal cell cancer using Nivolumab and Ipilimumab with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Primary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal'
  AND (
        "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Ipilimumab%'
      OR ("Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' AND "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Ipilimumab%')
      )
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" AS NUMERIC) > 21
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;

per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung cancer'
  AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab'
  AND LOWER("Control regimen") LIKE ANY (ARRAY['%erlotinib%', '%gefitinib%', '%afatinib%', '%osimertinib%', '%dacomitinib%', '%vandetanib%', '%crizotinib%'])
  AND "Type of control" != 'Chemo';

SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Primary endpoint", "Originial publication or Follow-up"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2'
  AND "Cancer type" = 'Non-small cell lung cancer'
  AND "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4';

per_item.question: Which phase 2 clinical trials for colorectal cancer compared immunotherapy to interferon, excluding trials where the control arm was best supportive care?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Total sample size", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Primary endpoint"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal'
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2'
  AND "Control regimen" = 'Interferon'
  AND "Type of control" != 'Best supportive care'
  AND "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL;
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';

FROM clinical_trials

per_item.question: Which trials for Hodgkin Lymphoma compared antibody-drug conjugate to chemotherapy in phase 3?

  "Total sample size",
  "Treatment regimen",
  "Name of ICI",
